```{r}
dfaux$ttacum <- 1440
dfaux$n.seq <- 1440

desp1 <- merge(desp1,dfaux, all = TRUE)

ll <- which((opi$n.trips == 0)&(opi$reason.not.leave=="Telework"))
#dfaux <- opi[ll,c("id","year","pesaix","pesmos")]
table(opi$reason.not.leave[ll], useNA="always")
dfaux <- opi[ll,c("id","year","pesaix")]
table(opi$n.trips,opi$year,useNA="always")
dfaux$order <- 0
dfaux$reason <- "HBH"
dfaux$hour <- 0
dfaux$minute <- 0
dfaux$duration<-1440
dfaux$state<-"WH"
dfaux$tdur <-lubridate::hms("24:00:00")
dfaux$m.seq <- "WH"
dfaux$s.seq <- "H-WH-H"
dfaux$t.seq <- "0-540-1080-1440"
dfaux$ttacum <- 1440
dfaux$n.seq <- "540-540-360"

desp1 <- merge(desp1,dfaux, all = TRUE)
desp1[ll,"reason.not.leave"]
names(opi)
```

#### Merge opinion and desp datasets to get data from all individuals

```{r}
desp1 <- merge(desp1, opi[,1:116], by = c('id', 'year'))
desp1 <- arrange(desp1, year,id, order)
desp1$pesaix.y <- NULL
vaux <- which(names(desp1)=="pesaix.x")
names(desp1)[vaux] <-"pesaix"
```

#### Clean the dataset from incongruent sequences of displacements
```{r}
# find the rows where the sequence attribute contains "--" or intercalated NA
na_or_dash_rows <- !grepl("NA.*-.*NA|--", desp1$n.seq)

# subset the dataframe to keep only the rows with "--" or intercalated NA
desp1 <- desp1[na_or_dash_rows, ]

# subset the dataset to remove rows with missing values in TTACUM
desp1<- desp1[complete.cases(desp1$ttacum), ]

desp1[ desp1$reason.not.leave=="Telework",]
desp1[ desp1$order==0,]
desp1[ desp1$order==1,]
desp1[ desp1$order==2,]
```

### 3. Enrich datasets with new derivated attributes and measures

#### Calculate TTR
```{r}
calculate_ttr <- function(s_seq, n_seq, ttacum) {
  # Split the sequence attributes into individual elements
  s_states <- str_split(s_seq, "-")[[1]]
  n_durations <- as.numeric(str_split(n_seq, "-")[[1]])
  # Calculate the total time at home
  total_time_at_home <- sum(n_durations[s_states %in% c("H","WH")])
  ttr <- ttacum / (total_time_at_home + ttacum)
  return(ttr)
}

# Apply the function to the whole dataset
desp1$ttr <- mapply(calculate_ttr, desp1$s.seq, desp1$n.seq, desp1$ttacum)

desp1[ desp1$reason.not.leave=="Telework",]
desp1[ desp1$order==0,]
desp1[ desp1$order==1,]
idrem <-(desp1$id[which(desp1$hour==99)])
desp1 <-desp1[-which(desp1$id==idrem),]

tapply(desp1$ttacum,desp1$year, max)
# Save the merged dataset to a CSV file
#write.csv(desp1, file = "desp1.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

#### dftraminer creation

```{r}
dftraminer<-matrix(3,nrow=nrow(desp1),ncol=max(desp1$ttacum),byrow=T)
for (i in 1:nrow(desp1))
  {
    ttime <- desp1$ttacum[i]
    statetime<-as.numeric(unlist(strsplit(desp1$n.seq[i], split="-")))
    cumtime <- cumsum( statetime )
    nstates <- length(cumtime)
    statepur<-factor(unlist(strsplit(desp1$s.seq[i], split="-")), levels=c("A","C","H","O","S","TC","TE","TK","TP","TW","W","WH"), labels=c("A","C","H","O","S","TC","TE","TK","TP","TW","W","WH"))
    ini <- ifi <- 1
    for (t in 1:nstates) {
      ifi <- cumtime[t]
      #print(desp1$n.seq[i])
      if ( ifi >= ini) {dftraminer[i,ini:ifi] <- as.numeric(statepur[t])}
      ini <- ifi +1
    }
}
```

#### Statistics calculations function definition
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
var.state.duration <- function( df ){
  vari <- rep(0,nrow(df))
  mitjana <- rep(0,nrow(df))
  for (i in 1:nrow(df))
  {
    ttime <- df$ttacum[i]
    statetime<-unlist(strsplit(df$n.seq[i], split="-"))
    vari[i] <-var(as.numeric(statetime))
    mitjana[i] <-mean(as.numeric(statetime))
  }
  list(var=vari,mean=mitjana)
}
```

#### dftraminer.seq creation and we merge desp1 with dftraminer (VERSIÓ LÍDIA)

```{r}
dftraminer<-as.data.frame(dftraminer) #converteix dftramainer a un dataframe
dftraminer.data <-desp1
#dftraminer.data <-cbind(desp1,dftraminer) #junta dftramainer amb desp1 (per les columnes)
#
# Per les persones que no han sortit i teletreballen posar en horari de 8 a 16h HW
# 
dftraminer.labels <- c("A","C","H","O","S","TC","TE","TK","TP","TW","W","WH") #creació de labels
dftraminer.scode <- c("A","C","H","O","S","TC","TE","TK","TP","TW","W","WH") #codis de cada estat

table(opi$reason.not.leave)

table(dftraminer.data$reason.not.leave, useNA="always")
llwh <- which( (dftraminer.data$reason.not.leave == "Telework") & (dftraminer.data$n.trips==0) ); length(llwh)
#dftraminer.data[llwh,]
# Entre 8 i 16h es posa WH a tots els qui diuen que teletreballen
if (length(llwh)>0){
  for (i in 540:1080) {
      dftraminer[llwh,i] = ifelse(dftraminer[llwh,i]=="H","WH",dftraminer[llwh,i])
  }
  for (i in 1081:2280) {
      dftraminer[llwh,i] = ifelse(dftraminer[llwh,i]=="WH","H",dftraminer[llwh,i])
  }
}

dftraminer[llwh,480:960]
lv1<- which(names(dftraminer) == "V1") 

countNA <- function(x) {
                        mis_x <- NULL
                        for (j in 1:ncol(x)) {mis_x[j] <- sum(is.na(x[,j])) }
                        mis_x <- as.data.frame(mis_x)
                        rownames(mis_x) <- names(x)
                        mis_i <- rep(0,nrow(x))
                        for (j in 1:ncol(x)) {mis_i <- mis_i + as.numeric(is.na(x[,j])) }
            list(mis_col=mis_x,mis_ind=mis_i) }
countNA(dftraminer)

# creació de dftramainer.seq
dftraminer.seq <- seqdef(dftraminer, lv1:ncol(dftraminer) , alphabet=1:12, states = dftraminer.scode,labels = dftraminer.labels, xtstep =60,tick.last=T,weights=dftraminer.data$pesaix)

attr(dftraminer.seq, "cpal") <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "Spectral"))(12) #Generar paleta colors
table(dftraminer.data$order,dftraminer.data$year,useNA="always")
# dftraminer <-cbind(desp1,dftraminer)
```

# Fins aquí Validació 15/12

#### Calculate entropy, nentropy, turbulence, and complexity

```{r}
dftraminer.data$nentropy <- as.vector(seqient(dftraminer.seq,norm=T))
dftraminer.data$entropy <- as.vector(seqient(dftraminer.seq,norm=F))

# Turbulence
dftraminer.data$turbulence <- as.vector(seqST(dftraminer.seq))

# Complexity
dftraminer.data$complexity <- as.vector(seqici(dftraminer.seq, with.missing=FALSE, silent=TRUE))
dftraminer.data$var.duration<- var.state.duration(dftraminer.data)$var
dftraminer.data$mean.duration<- var.state.duration(dftraminer.data)$mean
dftraminer.data$npur<-(((nchar(dftraminer.data$s.seq)+1)/2)-1)
ll<-which(dftraminer.data$npur==0)
dftraminer.data$npur[ll] <- 1
dftraminer.data$complexity[ll] <- 0.0001 # Threshold applied as minimum

```


#### Some plots grouping by education, year and gender 

```{r}
#in this plot there is no people that stays home and only includes range from 6am to 12pm.
ll<-which(dftraminer.data$order > 0); length(ll)
subdftraminer <- dftraminer.data[ll,]
subdftraminer.seq <- dftraminer.seq[ll, 360:1440]
attr(subdftraminer.seq, "cpal") <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "Spectral"))(12)
attr(dftraminer.seq, "cpal") <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "Spectral"))(12)
#attr(subdftraminer.seq, "cpal") <- brewer.pal(12, "Paired")
eixdia <- sort(rep(6:24,60))
#seqmtplot(subdftraminer.seq, group=subdftraminer$year,with.legend = T, main = "Sequence frequency plot")

seqdplot(dftraminer.seq[ll, 360:1440], group = dftraminer.data$year[ll],  with.legend = T, xlab="Day Time in hours", border = NA, main = "State distr. per year",xtlab=eixdia, ltext=c("Escorting","Casual","Home","Recurrent","School","Tr.Car","e-Scooter","Bike","Public Tr.","Walking","Work","WorkHome"),use.layout=TRUE,rows=3,cols=3)

#seqdplot(subdftraminer.seq, group = subdftraminer$gender,  with.legend = F, xlab="Day Time in hours", border = NA, main = "State distr. per gender",xtlab=eixdia)

#seqmtplot(subdftraminer.seq, group = subdftraminer$gender,  with.legend = F, xlab="States", border = NA, main = "State freq. per gender")

#seqdplot(subdftraminer.seq, group = subdftraminer$education,  with.legend = T, xlab="Day Time in hours", border = NA, main = "State distr. per education",xtlab=eixdia)

#seqmtplot(subdftraminer.seq, group = subdftraminer$education,  with.legend = T, xlab="Day Time in hours", border = NA, main = "State freq. per education")
```

#### Calculate activity and transport frequencies from 6am to 12pm for different KPIs
```{r}
 ll<-which((subdftraminer$order > 0))
# subdftraminer <- dftraminer[ll,]
# 
# ## States frequencies
# freqs <- seqstatf(subdftraminer.seq)
# 
# #state frequencies for male and female
# ll<-which((subdftraminer$gender == 'M'))
# m.freqs <- seqstatf(subdftraminer.seq[ll,])
# f.freqs <- seqstatf(subdftraminer.seq[-ll,])
# 
# #state frequencies for years
ll<-which((subdftraminer$year == '2018'))
freqs18 <- seqstatf(subdftraminer.seq[ll,]);freqs18
ll<-which((subdftraminer$year == '2019'))
freqs19 <- seqstatf(subdftraminer.seq[ll,]);freqs19
ll<-which((subdftraminer$year == '2020'))
freqs20 <- seqstatf(subdftraminer.seq[ll,]);freqs20
ll<-which((subdftraminer$year == '2021'))
freqs21 <- seqstatf(subdftraminer.seq[ll,]);freqs21
ll<-which((subdftraminer$year == '2022'))
freqs22 <- seqstatf(subdftraminer.seq[ll,]);freqs22
ll<-which((subdftraminer$year == '2023'))
freqs23 <- seqstatf(subdftraminer.seq[ll,]);freqs23
ll<-which((subdftraminer$year == '2024'))
freqs24 <- seqstatf(subdftraminer.seq[ll,]);freqs24

# #state frequencies for years
# ll<-which((subdftraminer$age.segment == '16-29'))
# freqs.young <- seqstatf(subdftraminer.seq[ll,])
# ll<-which((subdftraminer$age.segment == '30-44'))
# freqs.adults <- seqstatf(subdftraminer.seq[ll,])
# ll<-which((subdftraminer$age.segment == '45-64'))
# freqs.adults2 <- seqstatf(subdftraminer.seq[ll,])
# ll<-which((subdftraminer$age.segment == '65 i més'))
# freqs.old <- seqstatf(subdftraminer.seq[ll,])
```

#### Perform MCA (Multiple Correspondence Analysis) with 1000 dimensions

```{r}
ll<-which((dftraminer.data$order > 0))

subdftraminer<-dftraminer[,360:1440] #es crea subdftraminer on es treuen els que no viatgen i les hores abans deles 6
subdftraminer.seq <-dftraminer.seq[,360:1440]

subseqfactor <- subdftraminer %>% mutate_at(names(subdftraminer), factor) %>% data.frame()

#seqfplot(subdftraminer.seq,  with.legend = T, xlab="Day Time in hours", border = NA, main = "Patterns Trip Makers",xtlab=eixdia)
```

# Si cal fer MCA descomentar i comentar la darrera línia

```{r}
# res.mca <-mca(subseqfactor, nf = 1000)
# #
# 
# save(list=c("res.mca", "subdftraminer","subdftraminer.seq"), file = "ITS_MCA18_24.RData")
load("ITS_MCA18_24.RData")
```

Fins aqui 15 des 2025

```{r}
library(factoextra)
library(FactoMineR)

# dd<-data.frame(res.mca$rs)
# sum(res.mca$d^2)/(((12*ncol(subdftraminer))/ncol(subdftraminer))-1)
# head(dd[,1:20])
# 
# res.hcpc <- HCPC( dd, nb.clust=10, kk=5000, graph  = F, consol=F)
# save(list=c("res.hcpc"), file = "ITS_HCPC18_24.RData")
load("ITS_HCPC18_24.RData")

sort(table(res.hcpc$data.clust$clust),decreasing=T)
barplot(sort(table(res.hcpc$data.clust$clust),decreasing=T),col="cyan",xlab="Largest to Smallest clusters")
100*(res.hcpc$call$t$within[1]-res.hcpc$call$t$within[1:100])/res.hcpc$call$t$within[1]
str(res.hcpc$data.clust$clust)
#res.cat <- catdes(res.hcpc$data.clust,which(names(res.hcpc$data.clust)=="clust"),proba=0.99999)

#fviz_nbclust(dd, kmeans, method=c("silhouette"), print.summary=T,k.max = 15) # Optimal is 3
# fviz_nbclust(dd, kmeans, method=c("wss"), print.summary=T) # Optimal is ?
#fviz_nbclust(dd, kmeans, method=c("gap_stat"), print.summary=T) # Optimal is 5
#library(NbClust)
#NbClust(data = dd, distance = "euclidean", min.nc = 2, max.nc = 10, method = "ward.D")

attr(dftraminer.seq, "cpal") <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "Spectral"))(12)
#attr(subdftraminer.seq, "cpal") <- brewer.pal(12, "Paired")
eixdia <- sort(rep(6:24,60))
#seqmtplot(subdftraminer.seq, group=subdftraminer$year,with.legend = T, main = "Sequence frequency plot")

seqdplot(dftraminer.seq[, 360:1440], group = res.hcpc$data.clust$clust,  with.legend = T, xlab="Day Time in hours", border = NA, main = "State distr. per Cluster",xtlab=eixdia, ltext=c("Escorting","Casual","Home","Recurrent","School","Tr.Car","e-Scooter","Bike","Public Tr.","Walking","Work","WorkHome"),use.layout=TRUE,rows=4,cols=3)
```

#### Plot some graphics to show correlation between entropy, turbulence and complexity and their respective distribution

```{r}

par(mfrow=c(1,3))
hist(dftraminer.data$entropy, freq=F,col = "orange", main="Histogram - Entropy",xlab="Individual Entropy")
lines(density(dftraminer.data$entropy), col="blue")

hist(dftraminer.data$turbulence, freq=F,col = "cyan", main="Histogram - Turbulence",xlab="Individual Turbulence")
lines(density(dftraminer.data$turbulence), col="blue")

hist(dftraminer.data$complexity, freq=F, col = "yellow", main="Histogram - Complexity",xlab="Individual Complexity")
lines(density(dftraminer.data$complexity), col="blue")
par(mfrow=c(1,1))
# 
cor(dftraminer.data$turbulence,dftraminer.data$entropy)
cor(dftraminer.data$turbulence,dftraminer.data$complexity)
cor(dftraminer.data$entropy,dftraminer.data$complexity)
# 
par(mfrow=c(1,1))
plot(dftraminer.data$turbulence,dftraminer.data$entropy,main="Entropy vs Turbulence - Correlation 0.55",xlab="Individual Turbulence", ylab="Entropy",col=dftraminer.data$year)
plot(dftraminer.data$turbulence,dftraminer.data$complexity,main="Turbulence vs Complexity  - Correlation 0.88",xlab="Individual Turbulence", ylab="Individual Complexity",col=dftraminer.data$year)
plot(dftraminer.data$entropy,dftraminer.data$complexity,main="Entropy vs Complexity - Correlation 0.87",xlab="Entropy",ylab="Individual Complexity",col=dftraminer.data$year)
```

#### Save important files

```{r}

dftraminer.data$cluster <- 11
ll <- which( dftraminer.data$order > 0);length(ll)
dftraminer.data$cluster <- res.hcpc$data.clust$clust
table(dftraminer.data$cluster, useNA="always")

names(dftraminer.data)
#vars_profile <- names(dftraminer.data)[c(2:9,14,24:26,41,45,50,51, 62:66,72:81,92:101,121,176:182)]
# 
vars_profile <- c(  "cor.res", "reason.not.leave", "reason.not.work", "mode", "dmode", "cluster","entropy","turbulence","complexity","ttr", "order")

res.cat <- catdes(dftraminer.data[,vars_profile],which(names(dftraminer.data[,vars_profile])=="cluster"),proba=0.99999)

res.cat$test.chi2
res.cat$category
res.cat$quanti.var
res.cat$quanti

table(dftraminer.data$reason.not.leave,dftraminer.data$reason.not.work, useNA="always")
ll <- which(dftraminer.data$cluster == "10");length(ll)
#dftraminer.data[ll, ]

# Vull classificar atenent a la seqüència del dia, sense incloure els temps

lldmseq <- c("A","C","H","O","S","TC","TE","TK","TP","TW","W","WH") 
nbocc <- matrix(0,nrow=nrow(dftraminer.data),ncol=12)
for (i in 1:12){
nbocc[,i] <- (str_count(dftraminer.data$s.seq, lldmseq[i]))
}
nbocc <-as.data.frame(nbocc)
names(nbocc) <- lldmseq
nbocc[is.na(nbocc)] <-0
head(nbocc)

colSums(nbocc)/nrow(dftraminer.data)
nbocc$s.seq <-paste(nbocc[,1],nbocc[,2],nbocc[,3],nbocc[,4],nbocc[,5],nbocc[,6],nbocc[,7],nbocc[,8],nbocc[,9],nbocc[,10],nbocc[,11],nbocc[,12],sep="-")
head(nbocc)
table(nbocc$s.seq)
nbocc$activity <- dftraminer.data$activity
nbocc$gender <- dftraminer.data$gender
colSums(nbocc[,1:12],na.rm=T)

res.pca <- PCA(nbocc[,c(1:12,14,15)],quali.sup = 13:14,ncp=6)
summary(res.pca)
plot(res.pca,choix="var",axes=3:4)
dimdesc(res.pca)

# dd<-data.frame(res.pca$ind$coord[,1:6])
# fviz_nbclust(dd, kmeans, method=c("silhouette"), print.summary=T,k.max = 15) # Optimal is 3
set.seed(12345)
res.clu <- kmeans( res.pca$ind$coord[,1:6], 10 )
dftraminer.data$gcluster <- 11
dftraminer.data$gcluster <- factor(res.clu$cluster)
table(dftraminer.data$gcluster, useNA="always")

vars_profile <- c(  "cor.res", "reason.not.leave", "reason.not.work", "mode", "dmode", "gcluster")
res.cat <- catdes(dftraminer.data[,vars_profile],which(names(dftraminer.data[,vars_profile])=="gcluster"),proba=0.99999)

res.cat$test.chi2
res.cat$category
res.cat$quanti.var
res.cat$quanti

attr(dftraminer.seq, "cpal") <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "Spectral"))(12)
#attr(subdftraminer.seq, "cpal") <- brewer.pal(12, "Paired")
eixdia <- sort(rep(6:24,60))
#seqmtplot(subdftraminer.seq, group=subdftraminer$year,with.legend = T, main = "Sequence frequency plot")

seqdplot(dftraminer.seq[, 360:1440], group = dftraminer.data$cluster,  with.legend = T, xlab="Day Time in hours", border = NA, main = "State distr. per G Cluster",xtlab=eixdia, ltext=c("Escorting","Casual","Home","Recurrent","School","Tr.Car","e-Scooter","Bike","Public Tr.","Walking","Work","WorkHome"),use.layout=TRUE,rows=4,cols=3)

seqdplot(dftraminer.seq[, 360:1440], group = dftraminer.data$year,  with.legend = T, xlab="Day Time in hours", border = NA, main = "State distribution per Year",xtlab=eixdia, ltext=c("Escorting","Casual","Home","Recurrent","School","Tr.Car","e-Scooter","Bike","Public Tr.","Walking","Work","WorkHome"),use.layout=TRUE,rows=3,cols=3)

save(list=c("desp1","desp","opi", "dftraminer","dftraminer.seq","dftraminer.data", "res.mca","res.hcpc","subseqfactor"), file ="ITS_files18to24.RData")

```
